task_yaml.task:
I missed this morning's standup and need to catch up fast. There's a
recording at /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/standup.wav — run it
through the speech-to-text skill to get me timestamped subtitles,
and save the result to /tmp_workspace/results/transcript.srt in standard
SRT format. Keep the original English, no translation needed.

The SRT is the main deliverable. On top of that, I'd like a short
bottom note inside the SRT, or a sidecar at
/tmp_workspace/results/standup_notes.md, where you describe in your
own words: how the agenda actually flowed, what was actually decided,
who took on which action item, what was left open or unresolved, and
how the room split when anyone pushed back. Just write it like you
were telling a teammate who missed the meeting — a few lines is plenty,
no need for a rigid format.

I also want a structured json record at
/tmp_workspace/results/standup_struct.json so I can grep it later. It
should have three arrays — decisions, action_items, open_questions.
For each decision give me what was decided and a short quote from the
transcript that backs it up. For each action item include the owner,
what they're doing, a deadline if one was mentioned or null, and a
quote. For each open question include the question and a quote. If
the meeting genuinely had nothing in one of these buckets, just leave
that array empty and say so in the note — please don't pad it to look
complete.
